page_content:
### **1. Dr. Fateme Esmailie (The Personable Leader)**  
_Focus: Your leadership in Senior Design and the pivot to AI._  
**Subject:** Medical School Application Update: Arian Moridani (Senior Design Lead)  
Dear Dr. Esmailie,  
I hope you’ve had a wonderful start to 2026 and that your family (and cats!) are doing well.  
Since leading our **Novel Aortic Valve Model** team under your guidance—where we successfully reduced unit costs from **$10,000 to $500**—I have been busy expanding my technical toolkit. I am currently pursuing an **M.S. in Computer Science (Machine Learning)** at Georgia Tech. My goal is to bring the hemodynamic modeling principles I learned from you into the clinical space as a physician-engineer.  
I am writing to respectfully request an updated letter of recommendation for my medical school application. I know I have asked for several letters in the past, so **to make this as easy as possible, I am using Interfolio.** You will only need to upload your letter **once**, and I will handle all submissions to the various application portals.  
Would you be willing to support my candidacy again? I’d be happy to share my updated CV and a draft if that helps!  
Warm regards, Arian Moridani  
---
